title: Slate manifest (slate.json)
description: Metadata for a Slates integration package. The Slates registry validates this file at publish time; this schema mirrors that validation for editor and CI feedback.

name.description: Slate identifier in @scope/name form, e.g. @metorial/tableau. Must match the registry scope and slate identifiers at publish time.

description.description: Human-readable summary of the integration. Falls back to the package.json description when omitted.

version.description: Ignored by the registry; the published version always comes from package.json.

timeout.description: Function timeout in seconds for the deployed slate. The platform default applies when omitted. Maximum is 900 — the AWS Lambda hard limit; Function Bay passes the value through unclamped, so larger values fail the deployment.
